stories.title: 3M Open Preview — Scheffler Makes TPC Twin Cities Debut After Open Miss

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Scheffler vs. TPC Twin Cities this week. World No. 1 making his 3M Open debut after missing the cut at Royal Birkdale — first MC in four years. Kitayama defends. $8.8M on the line. #PGATour #3MOpen

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: 3M Open starts Thursday at TPC Twin Cities. Scheffler leads the FedEx Cup with 3,823 points and needs a win. 500 FedExCup points on offer. Three events left before the Playoffs in Memphis. #PGATour #3MOpen

article.headline: 3M Open 2026 Preview: Scheffler Makes His TPC Twin Cities Debut as FedEx Cup Stretch Run Begins

stories.title: Asian Tour Defects to PGA-DP World Alliance — LIV Loses Its Feeder System

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: The Asian Tour is joining the PGA Tour and DP World Tour in an alliance through 2029 — and LIV Golf didn't find out until Monday. LIV had backed the Asian Tour's International Series with $300M. It just lost its feeder system. #LIVGolf #PGATour

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: What the Asian Tour defection means for LIV: its secondary tier is gone. Top Asian Tour players now have a DP World Tour pathway from 2027. LIV loses the promotion system it built on $300M of Saudi money. #LIVGolf #PGATour

article.headline: Asian Tour Joins PGA Tour and DP World Alliance, Leaving LIV Golf Without Its Feeder System

stories.title: LIV Golf UK Preview — Rahm Chasing Third Straight JCB Title

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: LIV Golf opens at JCB in England Thursday. Jon Rahm won here in 2024 and 2025 — he's going for three in a row at the same course. Cameron Smith, Hatton, and DeChambeau also in the field. #LIVGolf

article.headline: LIV Golf UK 2026: Jon Rahm Chases Third Straight JCB Title in a Turbulent Week for the Circuit

stories.title: LPGA Women's Scottish Open — Korda and the Final Pre-Major Tune-Up

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Nelly Korda headlines the Women's Scottish Open at Dundonald Links this week (July 23-26). 19 major champions in the field. Defending champ Lauren Coughlin returns. AIG Women's Open is next. #LPGA #WomensScottishOpen

article.headline: LPGA Women's Scottish Open 2026: Korda Headlines a Final Tune-Up Before the AIG Women's Open

stories.title: FedEx Cup Bubble Watch — Three Tournaments, Careers on the Line

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Three PGA Tour events left before the FedEx Cup Playoffs. 500 points this week at the 3M Open. Jason Day, Brian Harman, and Tony Finau are fighting to save their seasons. Scheffler leads at 3,823. Tom Kim sits 35th. #PGATour #FedExCup

article.headline: FedEx Cup Bubble Watch 2026: Three Events Left, Careers on the Line
